name: iter_0001_island3_epochs40
reasoning_summary: iter_0001 batch, island 3: epochs 20 -> 40 (training duration test, may help if undertrained). All 5 children are bigru variants (only runnable family pre-entry-points). Single-axis perturbations explore the BiGRU hyperparam neighborhood in parallel; we learn 5 things per batch instead of 1.
